title: Checklists in Updates - Support by formula

posts.author: Steddy (Matthew Stedman)
posts.cookedHtml:
Implementation of checklist visulisation is inconsistent.

There is a very useful count shown next to Task/Item name on web version of Monday.com but not Phone app version.

I wish to show count of checklist items selected for a task in a colum.

I have tried to use formula to do this,.
However formula has no syntax to read “Checklist in updates” status or details…even though Checklist summary for the web version “appears” in the Task column"

My ask: Please update firmula to be able to access Total count of selected/unselected checklist items within an uodate for that task.

I am an Enterprise customer and am interested to how I can get this prioritised.
